projects.title: Kaal
projects.description: Our 30KG combat beast. Titanium-reinforced wedge, brushless drive, and a weapon system that has ended matches in under 10 seconds. Kaal doesn't fight — it terminates.

projects.title: Vega
projects.description: Zero to full throttle in 0.4 seconds. Vega is our line-following and autonomous racing platform — PID-tuned to perfection, built to lap the competition before they blink.

projects.title: Talon
projects.description: A racing drone that hits 80 km/h on a straight. Talon was built for speed, tuned for precision, and has taken first place in drone racing events across three states.

projects.title: Striker
projects.description: Fast, low, and impossible to stop. Striker is our robo-soccer platform — omnidirectional drive, real-time vision, and a shot that has scored in arenas from Lucknow to Kanpur.

projects.title: NovaMind
projects.description: Our open-innovation flagship. NovaMind is an AI-assisted robotic arm that won InnoQuest at AKTU Zonals — designed to solve real-world problems, not just win trophies.
